title: Containerized verification environment
purpose: Define a reproducible container and devcontainer surface for running the PNP verification stack with Node 20, npm ci, and npm run pnp:verify as the default container command.

baseImage.reductionPlan: pin base-image digest after first public review container release

defaultCommands: docker run pnp-verify:local npm run pnp:verify

ciMode.rationale: CI builds the same Dockerfile and runs a fast smoke command so container mechanics are checked without recursively running the full verification stack inside every container workflow run.

nonClaims: This container environment does not activate public theorem emission.
This container environment does not clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
The base image is pinned to Node 20 on Debian bookworm slim, but the manifest does not yet claim digest-pinned bit-for-bit environment reproducibility.
The CI smoke command verifies container build and execution mechanics; independent reviewers can run the default full pnp:verify command inside the container.
